title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Kinemon, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Toko, Unknown person #7 as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't really know what they were, so I used them as a coaster for a pot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And then, TOkijiro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: TOKI- Jiro?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yeah, I had 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But then camel said they'd sell for a pretty penny, so he took 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Camel?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: whereze... whereze...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Wait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: CAMEL? An animal?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm camel, alright?! Those blueprints put me through hell!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some guy stole 'em off me! He had his face hidden and everything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He said he was from Kuri.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Kuri an abandoned village

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: ol, kinemon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I give up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What did you say?! The blueprints

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: TO KAIDO'S MANSION ARE IN KURI?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: it appears so. What do I do?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I apologize for putting you through such trouble, franchise.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Help out with some other mission in the capital.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Got it! Don't worry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who possibly could need

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kaido's mansion blueprints?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Perhaps...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Lord Duke. Kin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We've stolen quite a lot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Food,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And weapons from the factory!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can get more, but Kaido's Lacks have started noticing...

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: AHAHAHAHAHA! Well done!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Did you leave the card?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes, of course.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The head mountain (shorts were here, she tend)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I wonder if this trick will work...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wano Country ruins of Kibi

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If I'm with you, mister,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I won't be mis- sing any meals!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look, can you shut it for just a little?

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: AHAHAHAHAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: IYO-]

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Shut it? How kind of you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I suppose its hard to worry about someone else's throat like that, no?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You pretty boy!() I bet the girls can barely keep their hands off you, young mister!()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look, I appreciate you paying for my sushi, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nonsense! No need for thanks!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I realized it the moment I saw you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't go wrong if I followed you! I knew it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I paid my last two pennies, and then I was flat broke!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The rest was luck!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And then you... at that next inn,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You gambled Big! And you kept winning!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They sure were mad! Those gamblers came after us with Katanas in the air!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you threw them this way and that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This way and that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't say anything, but normally no one messes with those guys.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're the Yakuza of the capital. Underlings of the Kyoshiro clan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Seriously, I was beyond scared!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm? I feel like I've seen that place before, Kasu.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I was a girl, my knees would've given way!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Kasu? Ahahahaha! You're not wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: IYo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But it's yasu!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The city you see in the distance is the flower capital! And right in front of it

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is a little hamlet called leftovers town! That'smy town!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why "Hamlet"? You'll see once we get there!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 65 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
